response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/cloud engineer with broad experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role demands deep embedded firmware expertise, C for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, LAN-switch networking security (MACsec, 802.1X), and native-level Japanese — none of which are evidenced in the resume. The C/C++ exposure at National Instruments is brief and dated (2014-2015), and there is no indication of Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement.
strengths: Long track record of shipping production software across diverse stacks
Some prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer tool
Comfortable with Linux environments and DevOps tooling
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF) experience
No Linux kernel source-modification or chip-vendor SDK experience; C work is minimal and dated

key_factors.factor: Limited and dated C/UNIX kernel experience
